title: Cytotechnologist
description: Providence Health, a mission-driven healthcare system, seeks a Cytotechnologist for our Ann Arbor laboratory. You'll examine cellular specimens, identify abnormalities, and support diagnostic accuracy for our patients. Work onsite in a collaborative laboratory environment committed to patient care and diagnostic excellence.
responsibilities: Prepare and stain tissue and body fluid specimens for microscopic examination
Screen and examine specimens to identify abnormalities and cellular changes
Prepare quality written reports documenting findings and impressions
Collaborate with pathologists on specimen interpretation and complex cases
Maintain laboratory quality assurance and proficiency standards
Assist with special procedures and immunohistochemical staining

requirements.education: Associate degree in Cytotechnology from an accredited program
skills: Attention to detail and diagnostic accuracy
certifications: ASCP certification required or eligible within 1 year

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Shift flexibility and paid time off
